name: Banana Mocha Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the bananas into a blender and process until pureed (about 1-1/2 cups).
2. Add the eggs to the blender and process until well blended.
3. Pour the banana mixture and remaining ingredients into an ice cream freezer container.
4. Stir until the sugar dissolves and the mixture is thoroughly blended.
5. Freeze according to the manufacturer's directions. Makes 1-1/2 quarts.
